source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Observer O measures the area 3 m$^2$ of an equilateral triangle ABC at rest in his xy-plane. An observer O′ moving relative to O at 0.6c observes the triangle A′B′C′. The triangle symmetry axis forms an angle $\theta = 15^{\circ}$ with respect to the direction x–x′ as measured by observer O What is the area measured by O′?

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: Observer O measures the area 3 m$^2$ of an equilateral triangle ABC at rest in his xy-plane. The triangle symmetry axis forms an angle $\theta = 15^{\circ}$ with respect to the direction x–x′ as measured by observer O What is the area measured by O′?
